headline: METRICS THAT DRIVE DECISIONS
subheading: The few leading and lagging KPIs that prove you are truly in control.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial composition evoking a pharmaceutical quality scorecard and early-warning system, centred on a glowing translucent dashboard surface floating in deep navy space, with elegant minimalist data arcs, gauge rings and clean trend lines rising and dipping like a heartbeat. Two layered conceptual planes contrast leading versus lagging signals: one stream of forward-pointing light beams in teal and cyan predicting ahead, another fading echo of softer markers trailing behind, suggesting foresight catching drift before it becomes failure. Subtle frosted-glass panels, a delicate threshold line crossing the field, and a single fresh-green accent point pulsing where a metric crosses its trigger. Refined geometric grid faintly receding, soft volumetric light, premium clinical-luxury mood, polished reflections, fine atmospheric grain, deep navy base with teal and cyan luminosity and one subtle green highlight. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
